历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 5908→7323→5890→6206→6384, with significant fluctuations in the past five years. In 2022, due to adjustments in the provincial control line, there was a noticeable backward shift. From 2023 to 2025, it basically oscillated in the 5900–6400 range; the 2025 baseline is about 6384, with a cumulative backward shift of about 494 positions over the past three years. The enrollment plan for this university in Jilin Province's Physics Category was 19 students in 2021–2022, reduced to 16 students in 2023–2025; the 2026 plan is 17 students, a slight increase of 1 student (+6.25%) compared to 2025, with a limited expansion that has a moderate impact on the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; in the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it is approximately 60th, with recent rankings fluctuating between 43 and 61, overall at the mid-to-upper level nationally; during the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, the reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents (paper data fabrication, dean dismissal, etc.), which may have a certain inhibitory effect on some candidates' application psychology; Douyin popularity ranking is 48th (relatively hot), with short video platform exposure at a medium-to-high level; historically, no obvious enrollment gaps have been recorded; Sociology is rated A, World History A-, representing the university's exemplary advantageous disciplines; although the Physics Category enrollment majors (Electrical, Electronic Information) do not directly correspond to A-level disciplines, the broader engineering category to which they belong has relatively strong overall strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and Automation have been highly recommended majors in recent years, highly matching the Physics Category enrollment direction, with major popularity positively driving applications; in 2026, the number of Physics Category candidates in Jilin Province is approximately 79,825 (estimated based on a historical proportion of 72%), a slight decrease of about 600 from 80,421 in 2025, slightly easing competitive pressure.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 6384, slight enrollment expansion in 2026 (ranking number increases), slight decrease in total candidates (ranking number decreases), negative reputation (ranking number increases), and high popularity of Electronic Information/Electrical majors (ranking number decreases), it is predicted that the minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 will be approximately 6653, with a range of 6153–7153.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Electronic Information Category (Artificial Intelligence, Computer Science and Technology, Data Science and Big Data Technology, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Electrical Category (Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation, Automation, Robotics Engineering, Microelectronics Science and Engineering, etc.).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other Physics Category enrollment majors (only two major categories, Electrical and Electronic Information, are offered in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: In 2026, the Physics Category only offers two major categories for enrollment: Electrical and Electronic Information. The Electronic Information Category has historically had better admission rankings (approximately 4656 in 2025), while the Electrical Category is relatively lower (approximately 5137 in 2025); the predicted ranking of 6653 is slightly higher than the historical rankings of both majors. It is recommended to primarily apply for the Electrical Category, use the Electronic Information Category as a reach, and also consider other universities as safety options.

历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 1043 → 2886 → 1318 → 1336 → 1579. The 2025 baseline is approximately 1579th place, with a cumulative backward shift of about 261 places over the past three years. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jilin Province was 5 students each year from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is 4 students, a reduction of 1 student (-20%) compared to 2025, which is a relatively large reduction, easing competitive pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. During the 2026 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation evaluation is clearly negative, mainly involving academic misconduct incidents, which may suppress some candidates' willingness to apply. 专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region

预测结论.text: Based on the 2025 baseline ranking of 1579, a 20% enrollment reduction in 2026 (ranking number decreases), a stable total number of candidates, a negative reputation (ranking number increases), and the positive pull of advantageous disciplines on the Liberal Arts Experimental Class, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be approximately 1340, with a range of 1099–1581.
